changes.value: Windows are restoring on hot reload and boards are preserved, but the window x/y screen position is lost. The create_window call creates windows with default position instead of restoring saved position. The tauri-plugin-window-state should handle this for windows it knows about, but dynamically created windows may not get their state restored.
Restored windows forget screen position on hot reload
